backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the navbar black-background bleed fix to Navigation.tsx with high confidence and a single test requirement.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, including the nav-transparent CSS fix for the Pre-Launch badge black bleed issue.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark CSS custom property tokens for the design system's color, border, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, SubsidiaryGrid, and Footer in a dark obsidian layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand logo, portfolio list, and contact/social links (email, WhatsApp, Instagram), using id='contact-section' as the scroll target.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-viewport hero section featuring a background image, pre-launch badge, animated gold shimmer headline, manifesto quote, and a smooth-scroll CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Interstitial section displaying the Luminia Group vision quote with gold gradient text, geometric background texture, and gold dividers.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, smooth-scroll desktop links, an 'Exclusive Pre-Launch' badge, and a mobile drawer menu; applies nav-transparent class when unscrolled to fix the black bleed issue.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: Modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a selected subsidiary, with keyboard (Escape) close support, navigation between subsidiaries, and animated transitions.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Defines the list of seven Luminia Group subsidiaries and renders them in a responsive grid, opening a SubsidiaryDetails modal when a card is clicked.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and session persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static corporate website.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines a dark luxury design token system (gold, obsidian, ivory), and declares reusable utility classes for the site's visual theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with luxury color tokens (gold, obsidian, ivory), custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the current version, known issues (black background bleed above the Exclusive Pre-Launch badge), and existing fix feature requests for the Navigation component.
